nodes.name: ⏰ Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: 9:30 AM EST = market open, 4:05 PM EST = market close. Monday to Friday only.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: 📈 Fetch Stock Prices (Yahoo Finance)
nodes.notes: Yahoo Finance public API — no API key required. User-Agent header is required to avoid 429 blocks.

nodes.name: 📰 Fetch Market News
nodes.notes: Replace the apiKey value with your own key from newsapi.org

nodes.name: 🔀 Merge All Inputs
nodes.notes: Waits for Schedule context, parsed stock data, and news — then passes all three to the prompt builder

nodes.name: 🤖 Cohere AI Analysis
nodes.notes: Replace the Bearer token with your own key from dashboard.cohere.com
